title: params.rs: tmp file extension produces .params.tmp not .tmp — rename may cross filesystems
description: ensure_param_file uses path.with_extension('params.tmp'). For path = '/home/.zcash-params/sapling-spend.params', with_extension replaces '.params' with 'params.tmp', producing 'sapling-spend.params.tmp' — that is actually correct since with_extension replaces only the last extension component. But the tmp path is in the same directory as the final path, so rename is atomic. However if cache_dir is a symlink to a different filesystem, rename across filesystems would fail with EXDEV and the tmp cleanup runs correctly. This is pre-existing (nie-qdlu.5), but the .params.tmp naming is unusual and could confuse operators who see it in ls output.
